summary: Script demonstrates solid PowerShell practices (Set-StrictMode, CmdletBinding, parameter validation, defensive error handling with -LiteralPath). Workflow structure is reasonable (appropriate triggers, least-privilege permissions, pwsh shell, pinned actions). However, deliverable is fundamentally incomplete: workflow references non-existent MatrixGenerator.Tests.ps1 and fixtures/simple.json; test harness required by task (run act with fixture data per test case, capture to act-result.txt) is entirely absent; no evidence of actionlint validation or act testing as mandated. Task explicitly requires "ALL TESTS MUST RUN THROUGH ACT"—this structure is missing. Cannot execute successfully as-is; missing critical components (test file, fixtures, test harness) required by requirements.
